scores.correctness_notes: All fields are accurate: services with override/command/startup/environment/on-check-failure, checks with level/period/timeout/threshold/http, log-targets with type/location/services/labels. Additional fields (backoff-delay, backoff-factor, kill-delay, user, group, working-dir, after, requires, on-success, on-failure) are all valid Pebble layer spec fields beyond the gold standard.
